commentaries.author: Aphrahat the Persian Sage
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Rejected silver shall men call them, because the LORD has rejected them. Aphrahat the Persian Sage Daniel said, “The saints of the most High shall receive the kingdom. ” What shall we say concerning this. Have the children of Israel received the kingdom of the most High. Or has that people come on the clouds of heaven. This has passed away from them. For Jeremiah said concerning them, “Call them rejected silver, for the Lord has rejected them. ” Again he said, “He will not again regard them. ” And Isaiah said concerning them, “Pass by. Approach not the defiled.

commentaries.author: Irenaeus of Lyons
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Rejected silver shall men call them, because the LORD has rejected them. Irenaeus of Lyons Jeremiah says, “I set watchmen over you. Hear the sound of the trumpet. They said, We will not listen. Therefore the Gentiles have heard, and they who feed the flocks in them. ” It is therefore one and the same Father who planted the vineyard, who led forth the people, who sent the prophets, who sent his own Son and who gave the vineyard to those other husbandmen that render the fruits in their season.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
